name: Cloud API Abuse Detection & Response
description: Detects abusive or anomalous cloud API call patterns such as enumeration, mass data access, or API rate abuse. Riggs AI analyzes the API call patterns to determine if they represent reconnaissance, data harvesting, or credential testing. Confirmed abuse triggers API throttling, investigation of data accessed during the abuse window, credential review, incident ticket creation, and team notification. Legitimate API usage spikes receive documentation.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: AWS Security Hub
required_integrations.reason: Source of API abuse findings and API management for throttling

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create incident tickets for confirmed cloud API abuse events

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the security team of API abuse detection and response actions

config.description: Triggers when anomalous API call patterns are detected such as mass enumeration of resources, unusual API calls from a principal, or API rate limit violations

config.additional_instructions: Analyze API abuse patterns: enumeration of S3 buckets, EC2 instances, IAM users; bulk GetObject calls; unusual Describe/List API volumes; source IP reputation
config.description: AI-powered analysis of cloud API call patterns to determine if the activity represents abuse, reconnaissance, or legitimate automation
Routes based on whether the AI assessment confirmed malicious API abuse

parameters.reason: Cloud API abuse detected — throttling principal's API access

config.description: Apply a service control policy or IAM inline deny to throttle the abusing principal's API access

config.query: CloudTrail data events for principal={{trigger_1.alert.principal_id}} in last 24 hours: GetObject, PutObject, CopyObject calls, data volumes, bucket names, object keys accessed
config.description: Investigate all data access performed by the abusing principal to determine if data was exfiltrated during the abuse window

config.query: IAM credential report for principal={{trigger_1.alert.principal_id}}: access key age, last rotation, MFA status, last used regions, console login history
config.description: Review the abusing principal's credentials to determine if they may be compromised or need rotation
Create an incident ticket with full API abuse details, data access investigation, and credential review
Notify the security team of the API abuse and all response actions

parameters.note: Reviewed by Riggs AI (cloud_security template). API call spike determined to be legitimate automation or deployment activity. Assessment: {{analyze_1.summary}}

config.description: Document that the API usage spike was determined to be legitimate
Cloud API abuse detection and response complete
